overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character approaching and entering the 'Empathy' nightclub. The scene transitions from a neon-lit urban street exterior through reception and security corridors into a vibrant, crowded dance floor with purple and cyan lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian street outside nightclub entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Empathy nightclub entrance along the neon-lit sidewalk

entered.detail: large industrial nightclub facade with dark metal panels and neon signage
illuminated white holographic human figure statue flanking entrance
illuminated white holographic human figure statue flanking entrance
large purple neon sign spelling 'empathy' above the entrance
pink neon sign reading 'LOVE HUB' above the main doors
overhead covering with purple neon strip lighting running along the street

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the Empathy nightclub along a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by purple neon strips. The industrial facade features large holographic human statues and bright neon signage, with the entrance becoming progressively more prominent as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub reception lobby with front desk

events.description: passing through the exterior doors into the nightclub reception area

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance past the bouncers into the reception lobby

notable_agents.action: two bouncers standing guard on either side of the entrance doors

entered.detail: curved reception desk with teal neon underlighting and a patron standing at the counter
purple neon 'empathy' sign mounted on the wall behind the reception desk

segments.scene_description: The player enters the nightclub through the main doors, passing two bouncer NPCs into a dimly lit reception area. A curved reception desk with teal neon lighting sits ahead, with the interior 'empathy' sign glowing purple on the back wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint corridor with laser detection grid

events.description: moving from the reception lobby into the narrow security corridor

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the security corridor toward the main club area

entered.detail: purple neon sign reading 'weapons' mounted on the left wall
red laser grid patterns projected onto the corridor walls creating a security checkpoint aesthetic
dark metal walls with hexagonal floor patterns leading to the main club

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow security corridor featuring a purple 'weapons' neon sign and red laser grid patterns projected on the walls. The hexagonal floor pattern and dark metal walls create a futuristic checkpoint atmosphere leading to the main club entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main nightclub dance floor with central performance stage

events.description: entering the main dance floor area from the security corridor
turning toward the central stage to observe the performance

agents.ego_description: moving through the crowded dance floor, observing the central stage performance and club atmosphere

notable_agents.action: performer dancing on the central cylindrical stage under purple spotlights

entered.detail: large circular central stage with glass enclosure and purple neon lighting where performers dance
long bar counter with teal neon underlighting and bottles displayed behind
second floor balcony level overlooking the dance floor with railings
pervasive purple and cyan neon lighting creating the club atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The player enters the expansive main dance floor, revealing a large central cylindrical stage with performers dancing under purple spotlights. The space features a main bar with teal neon lighting, an upper balcony level, and numerous NPCs dancing and socializing. The camera moves through the crowd, approaching the central stage as the performance continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit urban exterior into the vibrant, crowded heart of a futuristic nightclub. It begins along a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by purple neon strips and towering holographic statues, moving steadily toward the industrial facade of the entrance. As the camera passes through the main doors and by security personnel, the environment shifts into a dimly lit reception area centered around a curved teal desk and a glowing purple sign. The scene then narrows into a futuristic security corridor defined by red laser grids and hexagonal flooring before finally opening up into an expansive dance floor. This final space reveals a massive cylindrical stage under purple spotlights and a teal-lit bar, with the camera gliding through a dense crowd of socializing NPCs toward the central performance.
